name: taskflow
description: TaskFlow - real-time Kanban project management app (full-stack TypeScript monorepo)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @taskflow/shared && npm run build -w @taskflow/server && npm run build -w @taskflow/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @taskflow/shared && npm run typecheck -w @taskflow/server && npm run typecheck -w @taskflow/client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @taskflow/shared && npm run lint -w @taskflow/server && npm run lint -w @taskflow/client
scripts.test: npm run test -w @taskflow/server && npm run test -w @taskflow/client
